core_mechanism: a supercritical pitchfork bifurcation in which a collective coordinate's effective potential deforms from a single well to a symmetric double well as a control parameter crosses a critical threshold, producing spontaneous symmetry breaking of the equilibrium position
brief_reason: The abstract reduces the system via a Lagrangian variational method to an effective potential for a quasiparticle coordinate that changes from a single well to a double well when the interaction parameter crosses a threshold, shifting the stable state from symmetric-about-the-origin to offset asymmetric positions.
